Other physical security measures, such as storage in a locked container or escort by security guards, may also be used. Because backup media is often transported from place to place, there are opportunities for media to be misplaced or lost in transit. For this reason, data on backup media should be encrypted so that any third party who happens to find a backup media volume will not be able to retrieve any data from it.
